rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding missing annex blocks only when the diagnostic explicitly mentions 'missing annex'
Do not add assumptions or guarantees to implementation scope
Do not add assignments to type scope
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex for guarantees
generic_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding missing annex blocks only when the diagnostic explicitly mentions 'missing annex'
Do not add assumptions or guarantees to implementation scope
Do not add assignments to type scope
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex for guarantees
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Component type annexes are the normal location for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equation declarations
Component implementation annexes are used for implementation-level bindings such as assignments when they are valid in that scope
anti_patterns: Do not add package-qualified identifiers, data types, or property references that are absent from the analyzed model and its configured dependencies
Do not add assumptions or guarantees to implementation scope
Do not add assignments to type scope
